summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CultGig multi-page landing site with React Router DOM v6. All 10 routes functional, navbar active states working, footer navigation operational, ScrollToTop implemented, and backend API integration successful.
passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (9/9 tests passed)
Waitlist API CRUD operations with proper error handling
Home page loads with 3D hero and all sections
Navbar shows all required links with correct active state (#EAFF00)
Features page renders with 12 feature cards in 2 columns
For Artists page renders with category grid, benefit cards, and 6 mock artist profiles
About page renders with timeline, 4 team cards, and values section
Contact page renders with form and shows success message on submit
Waitlist page renders with stats, form, and successful backend integration
Footer has 4-column layout with working navigation links
ScrollToTop functionality works on route changes
Mobile responsiveness with working hamburger menu
Active NavLink highlighting in correct #EAFF00 color
CultGig logo correctly links to home page
Waitlist form successfully submits to backend API
All CTA buttons navigate to correct pages

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All routing, navigation, forms, and UI elements working)
